summary_points: Core protocol and fuse reliability changes are the highest-impact updates.
Release tooling changes improve draft determinism and evidence curation.

categories.name: core
grounded_claims: WebSocket handshake validation was tightened for invalid client nonce flows.
Fuse mount cleanup now guards against teardown on inactive mounts.
categories.operator_note: No migration or API compatibility claims should be inferred from this evidence.

categories.name: tools
categories.theme: Release tooling contract and workflow updates
grounded_claims: Deterministic payload output and truncation metadata were expanded.

operator_note: Packaging updates are low-volume in this range and should not be overstated.
